contract_meta.enhancement: Replace wrapper with a real multi-node StateGraph and validate with a live LLM e2e.
contract_meta.rationale: The current LangGraph integration is a minimal wrapper that does not exercise graph orchestration benefits (nodes, conditional routing, loops). This phase delivers a true multi-node StateGraph aligned with the ADR while preserving API behavior and proving live LLM execution via a gated e2e test. This unlocks future durability and HITL work.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Implement a 6-node LangGraph (clarify, plan, generate, test, conditional repair loop, deliver) replacing the wrapper while maintaining API parity and proving real LLM integration via HTTP e2e.
project.scope: Backend orchestration only; feature-flagged runtime behind POST /api/execute with 202 + Location semantics unchanged.

execution_model.description: Document integration points then implement multi-node graph and validate with live LLM HTTP e2e.

gates.name: Multi-Node Implementation
gates.note: Deliver six-node graph with live LLM e2e.
acceptance: 6 nodes implemented with conditional repair loop
HTTP e2e with real OpenAI key passes
Planning stage optimized to avoid unnecessary retries

tasks.title: Document integration points and signatures
tasks.description: Capture exact lines to change in src/orchestrator/graph.ts and confirm function signatures for generateQuestions, decomposeTask, runInSandbox, multiTurnRepair.
actions: Note feature flag routing and store updates
success_criteria: Discovery file exists with precise line refs

tasks.title: D21.1 Multi-node graph (6 nodes)
tasks.description: Replace the wrapper with a StateGraph containing clarify → plan → generate → test → (deliver | repair loop) → deliver.
actions: Implement nodes calling existing modules with adapters
Add conditional edges and bounded repair loop
success_criteria: Graph compiles and runs under flag
Executions store shows running → completed transitions

tasks.title: D21.2 Real LLM e2e + D21.3 Planning optimization
tasks.description: Run HTTP e2e test with RUN_REAL_LLM=1; tune planning to avoid unnecessary retries and reduce time to first success.
actions: Capture executionId and append JSONL evidence
Adjust planning thresholds if excessive retries
success_criteria: Planning shows reduced retries vs baseline

fallback_policies.runtime: Unset AGENTS_RUNTIME or set to stepqueue to fallback

ai_executor_guidelines.test_driven: Run e2e after graph implements nodes
